text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with<n>Agnes Digital...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What in the?! T-T-T-Trainer! Theplushies in that machine! They're...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
They're Cuties! They're always<n>snapped up by
fans before the stores<n>even finish putting them on
the<n>shelves! But look! There are so<n>many... So!
Many!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As Agnes Digital says, there's a<n>claw machine
with a bounty of<n>plushies inside.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, my sweets! We'll have<n>you out of
there in no time! ♪ Hahaha,<n>nyafufufu!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
M-my... My whole body is shaking...<n>Is it 'cause
I'm... nervous?! I can't....

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I have to! Are you just gonna<n>stand here,
Digitan?! Ngh... Come on,<n>body! Move!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
